name: io.qent.broxy/elasticsearch
title: Elasticsearch
description: Search and analytics engine for indexed data, vector search, and observability workloads.

environmentVariables.description: Path to custom CA certificate for Elasticsearch SSL/TLS
environmentVariables.name: ES_CA_CERT

environmentVariables.description: Set to '1' or 'true' to skip SSL certificate verification
environmentVariables.name: ES_SSL_SKIP_VERIFY

environmentVariables.description: Path prefix for Elasticsearch instance exposed at a non-root path
environmentVariables.name: ES_PATH_PREFIX

environmentVariables.description: Server assumes Elasticsearch 9.x. Set to 8 target Elasticsearch 8.x
environmentVariables.name: ES_VERSION
